name: stark-figma-drive-mcp
description: MCP Server para exportar frames do Figma e fazer upload para o Google Drive (zero dependencias em runtime — dist/ ja vem bundled no repo)

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
